differential_diagnoses: Primary intestinal T-cell lymphoma (monomorphic epitheliotropic intestinal T-cell lymphoma)
Infectious enteritis (e.g., giardiasis, bacterial overgrowth) secondary to CVID
next_steps: Surgical exploration with resection of the involved jejunal segments for definitive histopathological diagnosis
Repeat immunophenotyping of peripheral blood lymphocytes and possibly bone marrow biopsy to assess for T-cell lymphoma
Repeat cross-sectional imaging or endoscopic evaluation of the small bowel to characterize the mural hypoenhancement
Transfusion of packed red blood cells to stabilize symptomatic anemia
Infectious disease consultation to exclude rare, chronic opportunistic infections given the history of hypogammaglobulinemia
Re-evaluation of intravenous immune globulin (IVIG) therapy optimization
